title: anisophyllum humifusum
intro: Anisophyllum humifusum, also known as Bearberry or Kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its leaves, which contain arbutin, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Anisophyllum humifusum include treating urinary tract infections and kidney stones due to its diuretic properties, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Anisophyllum humifusum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
